data.title: SIGA to Host Business Update Call on May 7, 2026, Following Release of First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On April 30, 2026, SIGA Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: SIGA), a pharmaceutical company, revealed plans for a webcast and conference call set for May 7, 2026, at 4:30 P.M. ET. During the event, CEO Diem Nguyen and CFO Daniel Luckshire will discuss a business update. SIGA, a commercial-stage company, aims to provide insights into its operations and performance. The call is a key opportunity for investors and stakeholders to engage with management and gain valuable perspectives on the company's strategic direction.

data.title: Dragonfly Energy to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operational Results on May 14, 2026
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp., a leading energy storage company and manufacturer of Battle Born Batteries®, disclosed that it will unveil its financial and operational outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, subsequent to the market closure on Thursday, May 14, 2026. The report will be accompanied by a conference session on the same day at 4:30 PM Eastern Time. Dragonfly Energy is listed on Nasdaq as DFLI.

data.title: Barinthus Bio Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Updates on Corporate Developments
data.description: Barinthus Biotherapeutics plc, headquartered in Germantown, Md., released its financial report for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. Operating under the ticker symbol BRNS on NASDAQ, the company, specializing in immunology and inflammation, emphasized their aim to create treatments fostering immune tolerance and potentially curative impacts. The announcement included an update on the corporate progress of Barinthus Bio.

data.title: DT Midstream Reports Strong First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: DT Midstream, Inc. (NYSE: DTM) revealed their financial results for the first quarter of 2026 in a recent announcement. The reported net income for this period amounted to $130 million, translating to $1.27 per diluted share. Concurrently, the Operating Earnings matched the net income at $130 million or $1.27 per diluted share. Furthermore, the company reported an Adjusted EBITDA of $308 million for the quarter.

data.title: Notice of Knight Therapeutics' First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: In Montreal, on April 30, 2026, Knight Therapeutics Inc., listed on the TSX as GUD, a pharmaceutical company operating across the Americas excluding the USA, announced that it will unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, before the markets open. Post the release, a conference call and audio webcast will be conducted by Knight, inviting all concerned individuals to join.

data.title: Laureate Education Reports Financial Results for the First Quarter of 2026
data.description: The company has raised its forecast for full-year 2026 adjusted earnings per share, indicating growth in profitability. This decision is potentially beneficial for shareholders as the company expects to achieve higher earnings than previously projected. The updated guidance suggests increased confidence in the company's financial performance and future prospects. Shareholders can anticipate improved results compared to previous estimates for the full fiscal year of 2026.
Putin did not invite Trump to the May 9 parade in Moscow, Peskov said.

data.title: Saia Reports First Quarter Results
data.description: Saia, Inc., headquartered in Johns Creek, Ga., disclosed their financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company, listed as SAIA on Nasdaq, reported a consistent diluted earnings per share of $1.86 for both the first quarter of 2026 and the same period in 2025.

data.title: Helus Pharma to Participate at the 29th Annual Milken Institute Global Conference
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Helus Pharma™ stated that Eric So, the interim Chief Executive Officer, will speak at the 29th Annual Milken Institute Global Conference in Los Angeles. Helus Pharma™ is a clinical stage pharmaceutical company focusing on developing novel serotonergic agonists ("NSAs"). The conference will occur from May 3-6, 2026, at The Beverly Hilton & Waldorf Astoria. So's panel, titled "The Next Wave of Health Innovation," is scheduled for May 4, 2026, at 2:30 p.m. PDT. Helus Pharma's stocks are listed as Nasdaq: HELP and Cboe CA: HELP.

data.title: Terra Clean Energy Corp. Announces Revised and Improved Earn-In Terms and Upcoming Drill Program at South Falcon East Uranium Project
data.description: Vancouver B.C. - April 30, 2026 - Terra Clean Energy Corp. (Terra) has finalized enhanced earn-in terms for its South Falcon East Uranium Project in Saskatchewan’s Athabasca Basin. The revised agreement improves the Company’s ownership path and capital efficiency for exploration drilling. Terra's trading symbols are CSE: TCEC, OTCQB: TCEFF, and FSE: C9O.

data.title: Chip Gear Firm Entegris Tops Targets On AI-Fueled Demand
data.description: Entegris, a vendor of semiconductor equipment, exceeded expectations for the first quarter and provided a positive outlook for the current period. As a result, the company's stock saw an increase. The success was driven by high demand fueled by artificial intelligence technology, with Entegris surpassing its targets.

data.title: Check Point Earnings Beat, But Revenue, Billings Miss. Cybersecurity Stock Falls.
data.description: Check Point Software exceeded earnings per share expectations in the first quarter, however, the company fell short in terms of revenue and billings. The company's stock took a hit following the news.

data.title: Dow Jones' Merck Tops Forecasts, But Growth Products Come Up Mixed
data.description: On Thursday, Merck exceeded expectations by reporting lower-than-anticipated losses, primarily due to the strong sales performance of Keytruda, which surpassed sales projections. Despite this success, the growth of other products within Merck's portfolio was not consistent. The company's positive financial performance during this period is highlighted by its ability to outperform forecasts, particularly in the sales of Keytruda. This news was featured in Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Accenture Invests in Netomi to Accelerate Enterprise Adoption of Agentic AI for Customer Experience
data.description: A significant investment has been made by Accenture through Accenture Ventures in Netomi, a prominent company specializing in customer experience AI platforms.

data.title: Burney Company President Named #3 Financial Advisor in Virginia by Barron's
data.description: Today, Burney Wealth Management revealed that Lowell Pratt, CFA, President of the firm based in Reston, VA, has garnered national acclaim. The headquarters in Reston has been catering to clients in Northern Virginia and across the country for over five decades. This announcement was made on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Short Squeeze And Earnings: Why Xerox Stock Spiked Thursday
data.description: Xerox Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: XRX) unveiled its Q1 2026 earnings on Thursday, causing a notable upsurge of over 16% in its stock price. The surge is believed to be attributed to high short interest levels, exceeding 28% of the float, which likely heightened buying pressure and accelerated the rally. The company's quarterly revenue stood at $1.846 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.747 billion and marking a significant increase from the previous year's $1.457 billion. Despite the positive revenue results, Xerox reported adjusted losses of 43 cents per share in the quarter, missing the analyst consensus of a 27-cent loss. This represents a wider loss compared to the previous quarter. More details on this news can be found on Benzinga.com.
